query:
UPDATE phases SET 
  title = 'The Silent Pivot (Recalibration)',
  period = 'August 2024 – April 2025',
  description = 'A gallery silence. Between the chaotic output of Vietnam and the somatic explosion of the New Era, this phase represents a withdrawal from production to focus on internal architecture, traditional research, and the difficult work of returning home.

If PH4 was an explosion of output (195 paintings in 4 months), PH4A is the necessary inhalation that followed. There is no physical artwork recorded in the public archive for this period. Instead, the creative energy was redirected entirely toward structural and technical recalibration.

This period marks the artist''s return from the nomadic "Peter Zone" to the stability of Hong Kong. It documents a season of intense personal inventory—confronting the emotional costs of the nomadic lifestyle and making the deliberate choice to plant roots.

Crucially, this is the phase of Apprenticeship. During these quiet months, the artist began a deep engagement with Man Luen Choon, an ancient traditional Chinese art supply guardian in Hong Kong. Spending hours with the sifu (master), researching specific paper fibers, ink recipes, and lineage histories, the artist laid the material foundation for the New Era. The art was not being painted; it was being engineered through the study of tools that had been used for centuries.',
  shortDescription = 'Gallery silence. Withdrawal from production to focus on internal architecture, traditional research, and the difficult work of returning home.'
WHERE code = 'PH4A';

  shortDescription = 'Gallery silence. Withdrawal from production to focus on internal architecture, traditional research, and the difficult work of returning home.'
